DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce.description: Deletes a Source-of-Truth tag by UUID.

200.description: Returns the uuid of the deleted tag.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-on.description: This endpoint is deprecated. Use GET /:account_id/events/tags/:tag_uuid/indicators with the optional datasetIds query parameter instead. Returns indicators associated with the provided tag UUID within a single dataset's indicator shards, with pagination.

parameters.description: Filter indicators by related event UUID(s). Multiple UUIDs can be provided by repeating the parameter.
parameters.name: relatedEvent

schema.description: Filter indicators by related event UUID(s). Multiple UUIDs can be provided by repeating the parameter.

parameters.description: Structured search as a JSON array of {field, op, value} objects. Searchable fields: value, indicatorType. Multiple conditions are AND'd together. Max 10 conditions per request.
parameters.name: search

schema.description: Structured search as a JSON array of {field, op, value} objects. Searchable fields: value, indicatorType. Multiple conditions are AND'd together. Max 10 conditions per request.

field.description: The indicator field to search on. Allowed: value, indicatorType, uuid.

op.description: Search operator. Use 'in' for bulk lookup of up to 100 values at once, e.g. {field:'value', op:'in', value:['evil.com','bad.org']}.

value.description: Search value. String for most operators. Array of strings for 'in' operator (max 100 items).

datasetId.description: The dataset ID this indicator belongs to. Included in list responses.

200.description: Returns a paginated list of indicators.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-on.summary: List indicators related to a tag within a dataset (deprecated)

GET /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-on.description: Returns all Source-of-Truth tags for an account. Supports legacy free-text `search` on tag value and `categoryUuid` exact match, plus a structured `filters` JSON array for filtering by metadata fields (originCountryISO, actorCategory, motive, priority, etc.). Country values may be passed as alpha-2, alpha-3, name, or common alias.

parameters.description: Legacy free-text substring match on tag value.
parameters.name: search

schema.description: Legacy free-text substring match on tag value.

parameters.description: Structured filters as a JSON array of {field, op, value} objects. Searchable fields: uuid, value, actorCategory, actorCategoryConfidence, aliasGroupNames, attributionConfidence, attributionConfidenceScore, attributionOrganization, categoryName, motive, motiveConfidence, opsecLevel, originCountryISO, originCountryConfidence, sophisticationLevel, priority, analyticPriority. Operators: equals, not, contains, startsWith, endsWith, gt, lt, gte, lte, like, in, find. Use 'in' for bulk OR within a single field, e.g. filters=[{"field":"originCountryISO","op":"in","value":["IR","CN"]}]. Multiple entries are AND-joined. Max 10 entries per request, max 100 values per 'in'. Per-field notes: `uuid` accepts only 'equals' and 'in' (other operators throw ValidationError) — matched against the canonical lowercase storage but callers may pass either case (the server lowercases before comparison); index-backed by the column's UNIQUE constraint and intended for batched UUID → tag resolution. `originCountryISO` uses its B-tree index for equals/not/in. `priority` uses its B-tree index for numeric comparisons. Other string columns (`actorCategory`, `motive`, etc.) are case-insensitive and unindexed; current catalog size makes this a non-issue. `endsWith` and `aliasGroupNames` contains/like are leading-wildcard scans and slow on large result sets. `aliasGroupNames` matches on the JSON-encoded text, so substrings can cross alias boundaries (a search for "apt28" will also match "apt280" if both appear in the same tag's alias list).
parameters.name: filters

schema.description: Structured filters as a JSON array of {field, op, value} objects. Searchable fields: uuid, value, actorCategory, actorCategoryConfidence, aliasGroupNames, attributionConfidence, attributionConfidenceScore, attributionOrganization, categoryName, motive, motiveConfidence, opsecLevel, originCountryISO, originCountryConfidence, sophisticationLevel, priority, analyticPriority. Operators: equals, not, contains, startsWith, endsWith, gt, lt, gte, lte, like, in, find. Use 'in' for bulk OR within a single field, e.g. filters=[{"field":"originCountryISO","op":"in","value":["IR","CN"]}]. Multiple entries are AND-joined. Max 10 entries per request, max 100 values per 'in'. Per-field notes: `uuid` accepts only 'equals' and 'in' (other operators throw ValidationError) — matched against the canonical lowercase storage but callers may pass either case (the server lowercases before comparison); index-backed by the column's UNIQUE constraint and intended for batched UUID → tag resolution. `originCountryISO` uses its B-tree index for equals/not/in. `priority` uses its B-tree index for numeric comparisons. Other string columns (`actorCategory`, `motive`, etc.) are case-insensitive and unindexed; current catalog size makes this a non-issue. `endsWith` and `aliasGroupNames` contains/like are leading-wildcard scans and slow on large result sets. `aliasGroupNames` matches on the JSON-encoded text, so substrings can cross alias boundaries (a search for "apt28" will also match "apt280" if both appear in the same tag's alias list).

field.description: Tag field to search on. Allowed: uuid, value, actorCategory, actorCategoryConfidence, aliasGroupNames, attributionConfidence, attributionConfidenceScore, attributionOrganization, categoryName, motive, motiveConfidence, opsecLevel, originCountryISO, originCountryConfidence, sophisticationLevel, priority, analyticPriority.

op.description: Search operator. Use 'in' for bulk OR within a single field, e.g. {field:"originCountryISO", op:"in", value:["IR","CN"]}.

value.description: Search value. String or number for most operators. Array for 'in' (max 100 items). Country values may be passed as alpha-2, alpha-3, name, or common alias (e.g. 'iran', 'IR', 'IRN') and are normalized to alpha-2 server-side.

parameters.description: Cache strategy. 'from-graph' serves results from the graph-node KV cache when all requested UUIDs are cached; falls back to normal path on partial/zero hit.
parameters.name: cache

schema.description: Cache strategy. 'from-graph' serves results from the graph-node KV cache when all requested UUIDs are cached; falls back to normal path on partial/zero hit.

actorCategoryConfidence.description: Confidence (1-10) in the actor variety (actorCategory). CFONE-only: stripped from responses to non-CFONE accounts.

aliases.description: Structured aliases ({ value, confidence 1-10, tlp }). CFONE-only: stripped from responses to non-CFONE accounts.

externalReferences.description: Structured external references ({ url, description }). Public: returned to all accounts.

internalAliases.description: Internal structured aliases ({ value, confidence 1-10, tlp }). CFONE-only: never returned to non-CFONE accounts.

motiveConfidence.description: Confidence (1-10) in the actor motive. CFONE-only: stripped from responses to non-CFONE accounts.

originCountryConfidence.description: Confidence (1-10) in the origin-country attribution. CFONE-only: stripped from responses to non-CFONE accounts.

originCountryTlp.description: TLP marking for the origin-country attribution. CFONE-only: stripped from responses to non-CFONE accounts.

200.description: Returns a paginated list of tags.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/cloudforce-on.description: Returns indicators associated with the provided tag UUID, with pagination. By default fans out across every indicator dataset the account can read; pass datasetIds to scope to specific datasets.

parameters.description: Dataset UUIDs to scope to (repeat the param for multiple), or 'all' / '*' for every readable indicator dataset. Omit to search all readable datasets.
parameters.name: datasetIds

schema.description: Dataset UUIDs to scope to (repeat the param for multiple), or 'all' / '*' for every readable indicator dataset. Omit to search all readable datasets.

parameters.description: Filter indicators by related event UUID(s). Multiple UUIDs can be provided by repeating the parameter.
parameters.name: relatedEvent

schema.description: Filter indicators by related event UUID(s). Multiple UUIDs can be provided by repeating the parameter.

parameters.description: Structured search as a JSON array of {field, op, value} objects. Searchable fields: value, indicatorType. Multiple conditions are AND'd together. Max 10 conditions per request.
parameters.name: search

schema.description: Structured search as a JSON array of {field, op, value} objects. Searchable fields: value, indicatorType. Multiple conditions are AND'd together. Max 10 conditions per request.

field.description: The indicator field to search on. Allowed: value, indicatorType, uuid.

op.description: Search operator. Use 'in' for bulk lookup of up to 100 values at once, e.g. {field:'value', op:'in', value:['evil.com','bad.org']}.

value.description: Search value. String for most operators. Array of strings for 'in' operator (max 100 items).

datasetId.description: The dataset ID this indicator belongs to. Included in list responses.

200.description: Returns a paginated list of indicators.

actorCategory.description: Actor variety. Allowed values: Activist, Competitor, Customer, Crime Syndicate, Former Employee, Nation State, Organized Crime, Nation State Affiliated, Terrorist, Unaffiliated.

actorCategoryConfidence.description: Confidence (1-10) in the actor variety (actorCategory). CFONE-only: stripped from responses to non-CFONE accounts.
